description: Operator belief diverges from the actual operational state because cues were absent degraded or misread
SERA_vNext_use: calibrate cue recognition and uncertainty handling
prohibited_use: use as automatic perception code authority

description: Operator goal remains coherent or becomes risk-bearing under incomplete situational understanding
prohibited_use: use as shortcut to violation labeling

description: Action follows the actor understanding even when that understanding is wrong
prohibited_use: use as excuse to skip actor-specific action evidence

description: Available cues were sufficient yet the action path remained misaligned
Hendy_relevance: Direct perception and action tension relevance

description: Context and hierarchy are rich but the direct actor still needs explicit preservation
prohibited_use: use crew collective as generic fallback

description: Organizational or environmental context explains the lane without replacing the unsafe operational moment
allowed_use: keep context and act in separate fields
prohibited_use: use context as substitute for the active failure

description: Unsafe operation is reconstructed as a bounded sequence rather than a vague narrative blob
SERA_vNext_use: calibrate earliest latest first-departure and critical-act structure
prohibited_use: force a single timestamp when the window is materially split

description: Record remains informative but not stable enough for closure
prohibited_use: use Daumas depth to pretend the evidence is sufficient

description: Later severity is kept separate from the earlier operative human boundary
prohibited_use: use late consequence to select the active failure

description: Structured interview deepening adds contextual and cognitive detail unavailable in thin official summaries
prohibited_use: use interview depth as substitute for traceable event facts
